title: ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. ronningeri
intro: Ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. ronningeri, also known as Ronning's ziziphora or mountain mint, is a subspecies of the Ziziphora clinopodioides plant, a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to mountainous regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. ronningeri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. ronningeri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
